title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China revealed JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid with a split AI brain for real-time control. Vietnam introduced Dyno and VR-H3 humanoids for homes, security, and factories. NVIDIA released Isaac GR00T, an open reference platform with Jetson Thor onboard compute.
